summary: A short, lightly color-graded recap of Secretary Noem's Panama trip: cinematic shots of her walking on a tarmac, a red-and-white repatriation aircraft with detainees boarding, Noem at a podium between US and Panamanian flags (faint 'PROMISE' watermark), and a meeting with Panama's president. Narration is conveyed only through informational subtitle cards and the clip has_audio=false (no music track). Despite mild cinematic styling it is a silent, caption-driven diplomatic/informational recap rather than a music-driven youth-appeal spectacle, so it falls out of scope.
notable_text: Subtitle cards: 'SECRETARY NOEM WITNESSED A REPATRIATION FLIGHT IN PANAMA'; 'CONVICTED OF DRUG TRAFFICKING, SEX CRIM[ES]...'; 'SECRETARY NOEM ALSO MET WITH PANAMANIAN PRESIDENT MULINO & OTHER GOVERNMENT OFFICIALS'; faint 'PROMISE' watermark behind podium shot.
